reflection: The current regime subtype is neutral. Based on the boundary conditions, the theory is falsified. The observed continuation of range-bound prices despite volume expansion contradicts the assumption that a regime driven by absorption rate failure under neutral regime would lead to price volatility. Analog divergence is not present in this observation.

extras.theory_text: Regime is driven by absorption rate failure under neutral regime; price remains range-bound despite volume expansion.. If delivery_pct > 50 AND volume_state = elevated: favor breakout higher. Else sector_zscore < -1.5 OR fii_net / dii_net > 1000 Crores: favor range persistence. Unless liquidity evaporates entirely.
